defaultSuggestions.title: OpenClicky source-change workflow
defaultSuggestions.detail: Default installed workflow for focused OpenClicky repo edits, dirty-worktree safety, narrow patches, and lightweight verification.
defaultSuggestions.installPrompt: Use the installed openclicky-source-change skill for the next OpenClicky repo patch.

defaultSuggestions.title: OpenClicky overlay UI workflow
defaultSuggestions.detail: Default installed workflow for HUD, panel, notch, caption, parked-agent, resizing, and Connect-tab UI issues.
defaultSuggestions.installPrompt: Use the installed openclicky-overlay-ui skill to audit and fix the next OpenClicky panel or HUD layout issue.

defaultSuggestions.title: OpenClicky voice routing workflow
defaultSuggestions.detail: Default installed workflow for Realtime, transcription, task-title speech, completion summaries, and spoken-status behavior.
defaultSuggestions.installPrompt: Use the installed openclicky-voice-routing skill to debug the next voice or Realtime routing issue.

defaultSuggestions.title: OpenClicky log-learning workflow
defaultSuggestions.detail: Default maintenance workflow for bounded log review, durable learnings, review notes, and archive-first updates.
defaultSuggestions.installPrompt: Run OpenClicky's bounded conversation-log learning pass and make only evidence-backed durable updates.

defaultSuggestions.title: GitHub PR workflow
defaultSuggestions.detail: Default connector-style workflow for repository, issue, PR, and branch checks when OpenClicky has GitHub access.
defaultSuggestions.installPrompt: Use OpenClicky's GitHub workflow to inspect the active repository or PR and summarize what needs action.

suggestions.title: Inspect LM Studio models
suggestions.detail: OpenClicky can use the active LM Studio window plus local context to summarize loaded models, server state, and next setup steps.
suggestions.installPrompt: Use OpenClicky's screen context for LM Studio to inspect the visible loaded model or server state, then suggest the next local-model action.

suggestions.title: Test local model API
suggestions.detail: OpenClicky can help verify LM Studio's local OpenAI-compatible endpoint and produce the exact command or app setting to use.
suggestions.installPrompt: Check the active LM Studio setup and help verify its local OpenAI-compatible API endpoint without changing credentials or starting destructive commands.

suggestions.title: Summarize current page
suggestions.detail: OpenClicky can use browser automation or screen context to summarize the active page, extract links, and turn it into an Agent task.
suggestions.installPrompt: Summarize the current browser page with OpenClicky's browser/screen context, then list the important links and recommended next action.

suggestions.title: Research from this page
suggestions.detail: Starts from the active page and uses live web search when the answer needs current sources.
suggestions.installPrompt: Use the active browser page as context, then do current web research and cite the sources OpenClicky relies on.

suggestions.title: Figma guided tour
suggestions.detail: OpenClicky can use the imported Figma app context for Auto Layout, components, variants, and Inspect/Design panel guidance.
suggestions.installPrompt: Use OpenClicky's screen context and app skill context to give me a concise guided tour of the active Figma window, pointing at visible UI when useful.

suggestions.title: Figma workflow help
suggestions.detail: Ask OpenClicky for app-aware next-step help using the Figma concepts and workflows imported from the old fork.
suggestions.installPrompt: Use the active Figma window plus OpenClicky's app skill context to suggest the best next workflow step and explain the relevant concept briefly.

suggestions.installPrompt: Debug the failure visible in the active developer app, patch the smallest safe fix, and report the exact verification result.
